name: health-mate
description: Health-Mate is an executable OpenClaw health-management skill with local Markdown parsing, strict memory-write templates for LLM output, daily/weekly/monthly PDF generation, healthy-day heatmaps, monthly specialty charts, hospital-and-doctor planning, and optional webhook delivery. Security disclosure: 1. MEMORY_DIR must be explicitly set. 2. Bundled shell runners read config/.env when present and write local reports/logs during normal execution. 3. Outbound network requests occur only when webhook or Tavily credentials are configured, or when runtime font download is explicitly enabled. 4. Users should back up config/user_config.json and config/.env before upgrades because some platform flows may reset local configuration files.
author: tankeito

env.MEMORY_DIR: Required. Explicitly set this to the Markdown health-memory directory the skill should read.
env.TAVILY_API_KEY: Optional. Enables Tavily-assisted fallback guidance and monthly hospital lookup hints.
env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: Optional. Enables Telegram delivery when TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID is also configured.
env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: Optional. Required only for Telegram delivery.
env.REPORT_WEB_DIR: Optional. Local directory where generated PDFs can be copied for public serving.
env.REPORT_BASE_URL: Optional. Public base URL used to build downloadable PDF links.
env.ALLOW_RUNTIME_FONT_DOWNLOAD: Optional. Disabled by default. Set to true only if you explicitly allow runtime fallback font download.

commands.description: Generate the localized daily Health-Mate report.
Generate the localized weekly Health-Mate report.
Generate the localized monthly Health-Mate report.

features: Executable local Python scripts and shell runners, not a prompt-only package
Chinese and English report generation with strict recorder-style memory templates
Daily, weekly, and monthly PDF reports with trend charts, heatmaps, and specialty monthly visuals
Monthly hospital-and-doctor planning with LLM-first, Tavily-assisted, and local fallback modes
Custom scoring modules and additional monitoring sections including medication and lab-style modules
Explicit MEMORY_DIR handling with no implicit fallback path in the shell runners
English-safe rendering fallback when the Chinese font is missing
Bundled Japanese documentation and local Japanese font asset for `1.4.1`
Upgrade-sensitive local config flow; users should back up config/user_config.json and config/.env before reinstalling or upgrading
